articles.headline: Viktor Gyökeres' brace helps Arsenal to vital win over Fulham in title race
articles.description: Viktor Gyökeres scored twice as Arsenal sent out an emphatic Premier League title warning to Manchester City with a 3-0 victory against Fulham at the Emirates Stadium.

articles.headline: Arsenal and Man City's remaining Premier League fixtures compared as title race hots up
articles.description: The Premier League title race is well and truly underway with Arsenal being chased down by Pep Guardiola's Manchester City in their hunt for a first top-flight trophy since 2004.

articles.headline: Arsenal go six points clear as Saka and Gyokeres inspire win over Fulham
articles.description: Arsenal moved six points clear of Manchester City and boosted their goal difference with a dominant 3-0 win over Fulham.

articles.headline: Nagelsmann to Man United? Matching top teams to new managers
articles.description: Several top Premier League clubs will be in the market for new managers this summer, but which moves actually make sense? We pick the best candidates for teams in the market right now.

articles.headline: Ipswich seal Premier League return with comfortable win on final day of Championship season
articles.description: Ipswich sealed promotion to the Premier League while Hull won the battle for the final playoff place on a dramatic final day of the Championship season.

articles.headline: Are Tottenham going to be relegated from the Premier League? What stats, charts say
articles.description: For Tottenham fans, the team's nosedive into the relegation zone has forced them to think the unthinkable - are they really going to go down?

articles.headline: What must happen for Man United to secure Champions League spot?
articles.description: Manchester United are on the verge of returning to the Champions League after Brighton's 3-1 loss to Newcastle on Saturday.

articles.headline: Dundee edge closer to Scottish Premiership safety with St Mirren win
articles.description: Dundee secured a potentially priceless three points with a narrow 1-0 victory over St Mirren at Dens Park.

articles.headline: Dan Ballard sees red for hair pull as Sunderland draw with Wolves
articles.description: Sunderland had Dan Ballard sent off for hair pulling as their hopes of European football next season were dented by a 1-1 draw at already-relegated Wolves.

articles.headline: Newcastle beat in-form Brighton to end five-game losing streak
articles.description: Newcastle snapped their four-game Premier League losing run with a 3-1 win over Brighton in front of their owners at St James' Park.

articles.headline: Brentford boost Europe chances with West Ham win, opening door for Spurs
articles.description: West Ham's Premier League survival is no longer in their own hands after Brentford boosted their European bid with a 3-0 win.

articles.headline: West Ham open door for Spurs with damaging defeat at Brentford
articles.description: West Ham have presented Tottenham with the opportunity to climb out of the Premier League relegation zone after suffering a damaging 3-0 defeat at Brentford.

articles.headline: Arsenal vs Fulham: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Fulham.

articles.headline: Everton vs Manchester City in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Everton and Manchester City.

articles.headline: Liverpool's Arne Slot: Beating Man United won't silence my doubters
articles.description: Arne Slot does not think a positive result against arch-rivals Manchester United will prove much to him or his doubters.

articles.headline: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: All you need to know ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Nottingham Forest.

articles.headline: Tottenham's Roberto De Zerbi hints at James Maddison involvement against Aston Villa
articles.description: Roberto De Zerbi has dropped his strongest hint yet that James Maddison will be fit enough to play in Tottenham's relegation battle, but believes he has already brought calm to the squad.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye PSG's Barcola to replace Salah
articles.description: Paris Saint-Germain's Bradley Barcola is one player Liverpool are considering to replace Mohamed Salah. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Rayan: Man City fans sent me congratulations after Bournemouth win over Arsenal
articles.description: Bournemouth striker Rayan says he received congratulatory messages from Manchester City supporters on social media following his team's league win at leaders Arsenal on April 11.

articles.headline: Could Bruno Fernandes break long-standing Premier League assist record?
articles.description: Bruno Fernandes is on the verge of equalling the record for the most assists registered in a single Premier League season.

articles.headline: Are Newcastle really in danger of being relegated from Premier League this season?
articles.description: Newcastle's poor run of form, and the results of their nearest rivals, has them in danger of getting sucked into the relegation conversation - are they safe from the drop?

articles.headline: Premier League players out of contract: Who could leave your team on a free this summer?
articles.description: ESPN takes a look at the players who are out of contract in 2026 across all 20 Premier League clubs.

articles.headline: Five times Arsenal have let the Premier League title slip away
articles.description: Arsenal's quest for their first Premier League title since the Invincibles' famous triumph in 2003-04 has recently taken a major dent.

articles.headline: Manchester United vs. Liverpool in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Manchester United vs Liverpool in the Premier League, including five key talking points.

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: Bayern, PSG competing in 'different worlds' to Arsenal
articles.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta said his side were teams competing in "different worlds" domestically to Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain.

articles.headline: 'Unbelievable feeling': Leeds close in on Premier league survival
articles.description: Dominic Calvert-Lewin savored the "unbelievable feeling" as he helped Leeds United take a massive step towards confirming their Premier League status with a 3-1 victory over Burnley on Friday.

articles.headline: Leeds on verge of Premier League safety after beating Burnley
articles.description: Leeds United bounced back from their Wembley disappointment by beating already-relegated Burnley 3-1 at Elland Road to take another giant step towards Premier League safety.

articles.headline: Michael Carrick: Kobbie Mainoo has impressed me since I joined Man United
articles.description: Manchester United caretaker manager Michael Carrick has praised Kobbie Mainoo's performance since he's been at the club.

articles.headline: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Conceição as Salah replacement
articles.description: Liverpool are reportedly looking at Juventus' Francisco Conceição as a potential Mohamed Salah replacement. Transfer Talk has the latest.

articles.headline: Aston Villa vs Tottenham in Premier League: TV channel, kick-off time, live stream, referee, injury and team news
articles.description: Everything you need to know about Aston Villa vs Tottenham in the Premier League, including key talking points.

articles.headline: Roberto De Zerbi urges the Tottenham players to block out the 'negatiivity'
articles.description: Tottenham head coach Roberto De Zerbi has urged his players to block out external negativity.

articles.headline: Callum McFarlane: Chelsea can still achieve Champions League football this season
articles.description: Chelsea Interim head coach Callum McFarlane believes his side still have many things to play for this season.

articles.headline: Mikel Arteta: Arsenal fans need to be positive and behind the players vs. Fulham
articles.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta believes home advantage will be key for them when they face Fulham in the Premier League.
